data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ManTryingToDigTunnel:
My papa told me.\pHe says this tunnel is full of
timid POKéMON.\pThey get all scared of loud noise and
make a big uproar.\pSo they had to stop the big tunnel
project.\pBut there's one man.
He's trying to dig the tunnel by himself!
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ManDugTunnelForLove: There was a man who dug a tunnel for\na lady he loved.\pI don't really get it, but hey!
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_AirCleanHere: The way the winds blow, volcanic ash\nis never blown in this direction.\pThe air is clean and delicious here.\nLiving here should do wonders for even\lfrail and sickly people.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_MakeContestDebut: I'm feeling a little confident about the\ncuteness of my POKéMON.\pI wanted to make its CONTEST debut,\nso that's why I'm here.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_GuyTryingToBustThrou:
Did you see the cave next to the
POKéMON MART?\pThere's a guy in there who's trying to
bust up boulders so he can bust out\lthrough to the other side.\pIt'd be great if we could go through...
It'll make it easy to visit RUSTBORO.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_EasyToGetToRustboroN: That cave next to the POKéMON MART\nis now a tunnel to the other side.\pIt's great - it's easy to go shop for new\nDEVON products in RUSTBORO now.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_TownSign: VERDANTURF TOWN\p“The windswept highlands with the\nsweet fragrance of grass.”
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ContestHallSign: POKéMON CONTESTS\nNORMAL RANK REGISTRATION\p“Gather here, all ye POKéMON TRAINERS!”
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_RusturfTunnelSign: RUSTURF TUNNEL\n“Linking RUSTBORO and VERDANTURF\p“The tunnel project has been\ncanceled.”
